tagline: Last Gasp/ Sayonara
description: In the ancient times of a land of sand and wonder- if caused under the backs of slaves- it all began as some stories begin; with a tale of love. The high priest of Egypt, Imhotep, was very much infatuated with a woman named Anck su Namun. There was just one problem- no other man than the Pharoah could touch her; as she was the Pharoah’s chosen wife. Imhotep chose a solution to this problem- they would kill the Pharoah. Unfortunately, Anck su Namun had to sacrifice her own life so that Imhotep could resurrect her; as soon someone called the Medjai on them. Imhotep and his priests went to the City of the Dead, Hamunaptra, where they recited the ancient spells that would bring Anck Su Namun’s soul back to her body and mind- and they would have succeeded if were not for those meddling Medjai. The Medjai ordered that Imhotep’s priests would be mummified alive and saved for Imhotep a most terrible curse- Imhotep would be sentenced to the Hom-Dai, which would give him everlasting life and powers beyond reason, but he would not get to feel any of it as he would be cursed into an eternal sleep. That and being eaten by scarabs for a very long time. The Medjai had the sarcophagus buried deep within Hamunaptra, so that Imhotep would never be released again.

trivia: One of the commercials was filmed in Sting Alley.

The original concept of the event would have featured a show on the lagoon titled, "Danse Macabre". The show would be about a battle between good and evil with red lights being shown over the lagoon. The show would feature water cannons, airboats, ominous music, and floating banshees.

Allegedly, the event was going to have a house based on House of 1000 Corpses, which Universal was going to produce at the time. However, the film and the house eventually fell through. (Check the old ChainsawWolf threads on archive.org for proof)

This is one of the most IP-Heavy pre-2012 events, with even its main Icon being heavily inspired by many different IPs. The difference between here and the post-2011 events is that the creative team was given far more leeway to create semi-original concepts for the IPs.
There was going to be a parade featured at the event. Concept of it can be seen [https://www.flickr.com/photos/120203643@N07/13316610343/in/album-72157642718802284/ here].

A house based on the 1982 movie, The Thing, was supposed to be featured during this year. However, the house never made it past conceptual design. The concept of it could be seen [http://web.archive.org/web/20081120205931/http://www.hhnvault.com/horror_revisited/articles/thethingassimilation.htm here].

Dean Karr, the director of The Caretaker commercials for the event, said the commercials scared the community so bad that the local news interviewed child psychologists asking them if it was okay for children to be watching the commercial spots. The sales for the event went up to possibly 300%.
This was the first year the Frequent Fear Pass was offered.
This was the first year of the event to feature the now-modern event logo that had replaced the logo from 1995 during the Cryptkeeper’s debut.

trivia: The advertisement for this year's event was subject to [http://articles.orlandosentinel.com/2004-10-15/news/0410150146_1_mental-health-treatment-mental-illnesses-eastman-kodak mild controversy] due to accusations of being offensive to mentally ill people.
According to [http://www.horrornightnightmares.com/forums/topic/3378-secrets-of-hhn/ this], the Halloween Horror Nights XIV website had the names of Art and Design Members all over it.
The website development for this year's event was the most extensive to date at the time with detailed back stories created for all elements of the event.
The Festival of the Dead parade returned with the most detailed floats ever built. When not moving "in show" the floats became part of the Midway of the Bizarre scarezone.

Due to the hurricanes that devastated Florida in August and September, construction was delayed and final preparations weren't made for the event until last minute. The employee preview night was cancelled, and even on the afternoon of opening night, teams were still busy putting scarezones together. It wasn't until the second week of the event that everything was completely donehttps://web.archive.org/web/20081028211222/http://hhnvault.com/haunts/hhn14_facts.htm.
This was the only year from 2000-2011 to not have an icon.
The vomiting redneck and the Old Smokey animatronics in Deadtropolis and Hellgate Prison were made by the same animatronic company, [https://distortionsunlimited.com/ Distortions Unlimited].

Due to the popularity of this year, Universal opened all of the Islands of Adventure theme park on Fridays and Saturdays, as well as expanding Universal Studios Florida to include both Jaws and Men in Black: Alien Attack.

trivia: Technically the Terra Queen could be considered the icon as there was some advertising and merchandise in store that had her visage.
2010 featured a live presentation about the event and the vinyl albums of 2020-2021 from Midnight Syndicate featured 5 sound bites from the website.
According to TJ Mannarino, The Storyteller wasn't just a spooky character to slap in the commercials but used as a symbolic gateway into this nightmare world of Terra Cruentus.

According to TJ Mannarino, a big component for the event was taking the whole story and wrapping it into a single theme that he and the team felt Islands of Adventure was better suited for. Mannarino mentioned how Islands of Adventure, with its twisting roads and hidden nooks, is the perfect place to set up scares and really play on the rugged theme of Terra Cruentus.
For the first time Halloween Horror Nights had a comprehensive overall theme, Terra Cruentas, a new world with realms.
The Gorewood Tree Throne at the end of Terra Guard Run was the site of nightly bloodletting ceremonies in honor of The Terra Queen.

Faithful fans of the event discovered clues hidden within the pages of the website. A final mystery was solved on the last night of the event, allowing guests to enter a VIP area and take part in the Queen's final sacrifice.

This event featured a “costume contest” on the final event night. This was a rare moment in Halloween Horror Nights history in which costumes were allowed to be worn at the event. At the end of the night, the guest with the best judged costume won $5,000https://web.archive.org/web/20081026202205/http://hhnvault.com/haunts/hhn15_facts.htm.

This was the first year Universal offered a behind the scenes tour of the Halloween Horror Nights event. The tour, at the time, was $20 and featured a walk-through of Blood Ruins and Where Evil Hides. At the time, the tour was simply a test to see how fans and the general public would react. Due to its popularity, the tour would officially return the following years as the much more expanded and in-depth "Unmasking the Horror" tour.

trivia: The Halloween Horror Nights: Sweet 16 website had the names of Art and Design Members all over it.
The JAWS skippers wanted to use a more profane and adult script during the event. However, they were denied doing so by the higher-ups.
This was the first time the event was hosted by multiple icons.
This was the first year in the event's history that had extended hours from 5 to 12 AM during Friday and Saturday nights.
Universal would win The Best Halloween Event award for the first time during this year's event.

Permits show that originally "Scary Tales 3" would have been featured at the event located in the Curious George Goes to Town area. According to rumors, this would have originally been the icon house for The Storyteller, with the Dungeon of Terror: Retold originally being called "Dungeon of Terror: Reopened".
During Stay and Scream, scareactors from the Horror Comes Home scarezone would roam around and scare guests.

Even though this year's event was back at "home" at the Studios, Marvel Super Hero Island (Incredible Hulk Coaster, The Amazing Adventures of Spider-Man, and Doctor Doom's FearFall) was opened on Friday and Saturday nights to help with the overcrowding issues.

trivia: This was the first time New Line Cinema characters were used at the event in an official state (previous appearances were unlicensed).
Halloween Horror Nights Hollywood reused Jack and (loosely) the carnival for their event that happened the same year; as both coasts used The New Line Cinema characters.

New Line was very protective of the use of their characters this year. They were required to wear cloaks when cast changes occurred. Originally there were going to be the New Line Trio at Jack’s show, a Freddy vs Jason scarezone, and Leatherface leading the Chainsaw Drill Team, but NLC vetoed them all.

Despite the name change of the haunted house on the other marketing materials for the event, PsychoScareapy: Home for the Holidays still had its original name Silent Night Psychotic Night featured on the House Shirt that year.
This was the first appearance of The Rocky Horror Picture Show at the event.
All of Nox Arcana's music throughout the park was from The Carnival of Lost Souls album

Midnight Syndicate - who's music had been used for the event many years in the past - created two exclusive tracks for this year's theme, "Building the Carnival" and "The Carnival of Carnage". Both tracks have since been officially released on their albums The Music Of Halloween Horror Nights and Dark Corners.

scarezones.description: It’s time to take a look back in history and come face-to-face with the icons from our past. Iconic characters from the event’s 25 year history such as The Caretaker, The Storyteller, The Director and more will be found roaming the streets of Hollywood.

scarezones.name: Scary Tales: Screampunk
scarezones.description: This year, we’re bringing to life our most horrifying Scary Tales characters with a new twist. This steampunk-inspired version of Scary Tales is sure to leave you screaming.

scarezones.name: Evil'S Roots
scarezones.description: It’s time to be immersed in Halloween’s most evil traditions in the scarezone located in Central Park. Here you’ll find the event’s traditional jack-o-lanterns in the air as you encounter evil fairies, humanoid bats, scarecrows and more.

scarezones.name: All Nite Die-In: Double Feature
scarezones.description: Wander down the streets of San Francisco and you’ll come across this theatre that has been named “DIE IN”, due to the gruesome murders that occurred. Enter if you dare…

Despite replacing Scream in some of the promotional material for the event The Purge haunted house logo would not be featured on the house lineup shirt that year.
According to Michael Aiello, that year was the most diverse amount of houses they had in the event's history with 9 houses.
That year feature the most amount of scareactors in the event's history.

tagline: You won't stand a Chance!/ Terror Takes Center Stage/ Beyond Your Wildest Screams
description: Halloween Horror Nights 26 was Universal Studios Orlando 's annual Halloween event for 2016. The event was a direct sequel to Halloween Horror Nights 25, with Chance being this year's icon. It originally ran from September 16th to October 31st 2016, but due to Hurricane Matthew cancelling the event on October 6th and 7th the event was extended for a weekend, finally ending on November 5th. Halloween Horror Nights featured nine houses, five scarezones, and two live shows, with a separately ticketed house and a scareactor dining experience.

houses.name: Lunatics Playground 3D: You Won'T Stand A Chance

houses.name: The Exorcist

houses.name: Tomb Of The Ancients

tagline: Your soul is requested/ The best nightmares never end./The Festival of the Deadliest
description: Halloween Horror Nights 27 was the 27th Halloween Horror Nights Orlando event. It was held from September 15th to November 4th 2017.

houses.name: American Horror Story
houses.description: Experience three horrifying stories in one disturbing house as a deranged cast of characters seek not only your life, but your soul.

houses.name: Dead Waters
houses.description: Enter a pestilent swamp that oozes evil, the hellish realm of the Voodoo Queen. If you fail to escape, you’re in for a gut-wrenching sacrifice.

houses.name: Hive
houses.description: The crumbling house on 19 Hemingway Lane harbors a nest of bloodthirsty vampires. If you awaken them, you will face a savage, bestial hunger.

houses.name: Saw: The Games Of Jigsaw
houses.description: The traps are set. All that’s missing is you. The Jigsaw killer has returned to torment you with his twisted take on poetic justice.

houses.name: Scarecrow: The Reaping
houses.description: At a long-sabandoned Depression-era farm, vengeance takes root, and the only harvest that will be reaped is you.

houses.name: The Fallen
houses.description: You’re about to be caught in the crossfire of the eternal war of light versus dark. No one will be safe.

houses.name: The Horrors Of Blumhouse
houses.description: From the minds behind Insidious, Sinister & the Purge comes to the Horrors of Blumhouse.

houses.name: The Shining
houses.description: The visually intense psychological thriller is now the most terrifying haunted experience imaginable.

scarezones.name: Trick 'R Treat
scarezones.description: Break the rules. Pay the price. That’s the murderous moral of the five twisted stories in Trick ‘r Treat, a darkly hilarious tribute to Halloween.

scarezones.name: The Purge
scarezones.description: The Purge has returned to Halloween Horror Nights™ and overrun New York. No one is safe. Be a part of a proud American tradition. United we purge.

scarezones.name: Altars Of Horror
scarezones.description: Enter the nexus of evil, where all the most fearsome characters and nefarious creatures from each of the Halloween Horror Nights™ haunted houses lie in wait.

scarezones.name: Festival Of The Deadliest
scarezones.description: The dead are throwing a hell of a Hollywood party and you’re invited. Your spirit will fuel the frenzy of this ghoulish gathering.

scarezones.name: Invasion!
scarezones.description: The year is 1955, and a UFO has crashed onto the wharf. Their goal: to conduct experiments upon you to prepare to invade Earth.

shows.name: Bill & Ted'S Excellent Halloween Adventure
shows.description: After 26 years of Excellent Halloween Adventures, Bill and Ted are bringing their Farewell Tour to Halloween Horror Nights.

event_times: 6:30 PM- 1:00 AM: September 15-17 & 21-24, October 4, 11, 18, 25, 30, & 31, and November 3 & 4
trivia: The Caretaker was originally planned to be this year's Icon, but was shot down. Bone would be his replacement, but he was not allowed to have Icon status. But with time, he is now considered an Icon.

Many fans speculated The Amityville Horror would become a haunted house at the event this year due to an easter egg found in the Krampus haunted house from the previous year. The property has yet to make an appearance.

tagline: We Know What Scares You/ More Houses Than Ever!/ True Fear Comes From Within.
description: Halloween Horror Nights 28 was the 28th annual Halloween event at the Universal Orlando Resort and it occurred between September 14th and November 3rd 2018.

houses.name: Dead Exposure: Patient Zero
houses.description: Fear will infect you, plunging you into darkness against a plague of swarming, fast-moving zombies.

houses.name: Seeds Of Extinction
houses.description: Humanity is extinct, wiped out by a cataclysmic meteor. In its wake something monstrous has taken root.

houses.name: Poltergeist
houses.description: Restless spirits have overrun the infamous house atop a cemetery and will lure you into a place between life and death. Don

houses.name: Horrors Of Blumhouse 2
houses.description: The haunted minds behind Happy Death Day and The First Purge have spawned another horror house. Will you live to see tomorrow?

houses.name: Slaughter Sinema
houses.description: It’s showtime at the local drive-in, where you don’t just catch a movie; the movie catches you. When the credits roll, heads roll.

houses.name: Stranger Things
houses.description: Halloween Horror Nights™ takes you deep inside the haunting world of Netflix’s STRANGER THINGS. The Demogorgon is hunting in our world now.

scarezones.name: The Harvest
scarezones.description: An old barn holds horrors from each house. Foul creatures lurk between the hay bales, ready for a harvest of blood and screams.

scarezones.name: Vamp '85: New Year’S Eve
scarezones.description: As the ball drops in New York City, this New Year’s bash is about to bite. Literally.

scarezones.name: Twisted Tradition
scarezones.description: An ancient evil has been reawakened and transformed Halloween into an abomination.

scarezones.name: Revenge Of Chucky
scarezones.description: Chucky, the world’s deadliest doll, has brought a toy fair to gruesome life on the streets of Hollywood, twisting childhood toys into nightmares. You’ll be dying to play.

scarezones.name: Killer Klowns From Outer Space
scarezones.description: An interstellar circus tent has landed on the streets of Universal Studios Florida™. At this circus of fear, the joke

shows.name: Academy Of Villains
shows.description: With a wicked mix of dance, acrobatics and theatrics, Academy of Villains is back for an all-new performance of pounding synths and neon lights.

trivia: First time Halloween Horror Nights had 10 houses.
Despite The Horrors of Blumhouse (Orlando 2018) haunted house being featured at the event, it was not featured on the event's house lineup t-shirt.

tagline: You Worst Fears Live Here/ Maximum Screamage/ Take Fear to the Max/Totally Terrifying
description: Halloween Horror Nights 29 was the 29th annual Halloween Horror Nights in Universal Studios Florida. The event ran from September 6th to November 2nd, 2019.

houses.name: Stranger Things 2
houses.description: STRANGER THINGS returns to Halloween Horror Nights™ in an all-new haunted house, plunging you even further into the chilling world of the Upside Down.

houses.name: Nightingales: Blood Pit
houses.description: In an Ancient Roman arena, grisly creatures are drawn to dead and dying gladiators. With nothing to protect you, you

houses.name: Universal Monsters
houses.description: Frankenstein. Dracula. The Wolfman. The world’s most terrifying monsters have come together to tear you apart. It’s the more, the scarier.

houses.name: Depths Of Fear
houses.description: A mining corp built an installation in deep waters infested with something monstrous. There is no escape from your watery grave.

houses.name: Yeti: Terror Of The Yukon
houses.description: In a remote part of Canada, loggers and trappers seek refuge from the elements. You

houses.name: Ghostbusters
houses.description: Step right into the original Ghostbusters film where ghoulish spirits and ectoplasm-dripping phantasms materialize where you least expect.

houses.name: Killer Klowns From Outer Space
houses.description: Send in the klowns! The Killer Klowns are returning to Universal Orlando’s Halloween Horror Nights in an all-new side-splitting haunted house. The crazed klowns are back to wreak havoc and remind you why you were afraid of clowns in the first place.

houses.name: Graveyard Games
houses.description: Enter a cemetery at night, where disrespectful teens have awakened vengeful spirits. Don’t be caught dead here after dark.

houses.name: House Of 1000 Corpses
houses.description: Rob Zombie’s epic horror masterpiece comes to life as you attempt to escape the blood soaked house of the psychotic Firefly family.

scarezones.name: Zombieland Double Tap
scarezones.description: It’s time to brush up on those rules of survival. Based on the hit film and its upcoming sequel, this scare zone puts you in the middle of the United States of Zombieland. The infection has spread and bloodthirsty zombies are everywhere. The most important rule to remember: Always double tap.

scarezones.name: Rob Zombie: Hellbilly Deluxe
scarezones.description: You know his music, now it’s time to live it. Step into the heavy metal horror of Rob Zombie’s music and imagery in this pulse-pounding scare zone. From otherworldly beings to brutal maniacs, you’ll come face-to-face with his twisted creations as the music cranks to a frenzy.

scarezones.name: Anarch-Cade
scarezones.description: An 80s-inspired arcade has taken over Avenue of the Stars. At first glance, you may think it’s a party. However, you quickly learn that “Game Over” means a permanent end for you. A gang of neon slashers are out to play and this is one game you won’t want to lose.

scarezones.name: Vanity Ball
scarezones.description: Beauty is pain. Literally. In the streets of Hollywood, your flesh becomes the canvas as blade-wielding artists slice up willing participants into horrific living works of art. Here, going under the knife takes on a whole other meaning.

scarezones.name: Vikings Undead
scarezones.description: We’re all familiar with the brutal Viking warriors. It’s terrifying enough thinking about facing them alive. Now picture facing them as the undead. They have risen and laid siege to Central Park with an onslaught of gore. Bloodlust never dies.

shows.name: Academy Of Villains: Altered States
shows.description: This wicked talented group of artists is back for an all-new, bigger and better performance featuring a killer mix of dance and theatrics.

shows.name: Marathon Of Mayhem
shows.description: A monstrous new show is rising from the depths of Universal Studios’ lagoon. It’s a larger-than-life mix tape of retro mayhem.

trivia: This event year had the longest number of days than previous years.
Supposedly, the hit TV series Game of Thrones was rumored to be coming to the event, but never made it past initial discussions with HBO.
It was rumored that the event would feature an IT haunted house.

tagline: Never Go Alone/ The Biggest Thing In Fear for 30 Years/I'm Back/Jack Returns/ 30 Years of Screams/ 30 Years 30 Fears
description: Halloween Horror Nights 30 was the 30th annual Halloween Horror Nights in Universal Studios Florida. It was the 30 year anniversary of the event, and the first Halloween Horror Nights event to take place in two years after Universal skipped a year due to the COVID-19 pandemic. The event ran from September 3rd to October 31st, 2021.

houses.name: The Wicked Growth: Realm Of The Pumpkin
Puppet Theatre: Captive Audience
houses.description: A puppeteer and ballet troupe trapped in a deserted theater for years are about to turn you into a human puppet. That’s your cue to scream.

scarezones.name: Crypt Tv
scarezones.description: Step inside Crypt TV, a dark universe of monsters that reside in the same reality—on your screen, in your pockets and now San Francisco.

scarezones.name: 30 Years 30 Fears
scarezones.description: The monsters you’ve most dreaded from past Halloween Horror Nights have taken over the streets. They’re back and you’re history.

scarezones.name: Seek And Destroy
scarezones.description: A ruthless alien cyber regime led by The Controller has taken over New York, turning humans into fuel. Succumb or be destroyed.

scarezones.name: Gorewood Forest
scarezones.description: Sixteen years after the gory sacrifices of Terra Cruentus, the heartless Terra Queen is back. Evil is in her nature.

scarezones.name: Lights Camera Hacktion: Eddie'S Revenge
scarezones.description: Get ready for the feel-bad movie of the year. Eddie Schmidt, Jack the Clown’s brother, is filming a horror film and the monsters are real.

shows.name: Marathon Of Mayhem: Carnage Factory
shows.description: There’s no manufacturing the screams as a terrifying show comes to life in Universal Studios’ lagoon. It’s a fear factory.

shows.name: Nightmare Fuel
shows.description: A new show is igniting Halloween Horror Nights, featuring fire, pyro and aerial performers.

trivia: In 2020, Universal would have Silence of the Lambs originally at the event until it was cancelled due to the Covid Pandemic, the house would be later replaced by The Texas Chainsaw Massacre (Orlando) haunted house.
This is the first time the Event Phrase "Never Go Alone" was used, as it was carried over for the next three years as of Halloween Horror Nights 34 (with the exception of Halloween Horror Nights 33).

tagline: Never Go Alone/Bring Your Friends And You Might Survive/ Scares At Every Turn/Every Day Is Halloween
description: Halloween Horror Nights was the 31st Halloween Horror Nights event at Universal Studios Florida.

houses.name: Universal Monsters: Legends Collide
houses.description: If you thought one Universal Monster was scary, how about three? Better summon your scream squad, ‘cause you’re about to get caught in the middle of an epic battle between The Wolf Man, Dracula and The Mummy, together for the first time ever. Their mission: To find the amulet that will break their curse. And they’ll destroy anyone who gets in their way.

houses.name: Halloween
houses.description: Gather your friends and visit Haddonfield, Illinois, where Michael Myers is about to don his mask and embark on his first brutal spree. Silent. Merciless. Relentless. He’s the embodiment of pure evil. You don’t want to go alone as you go back to where it all began. This year, step into the original 1978 horror classic, Halloween.

houses.name: The Horrors Of Blumhouse
houses.description: Step inside a new double-feature of Blumhouse horror. Your scream squad will find yourselves trapped between a frantic teen and the ruthless serial killer she’s swapped bodies with in Freaky. Then, you’ll try to make a desperate escape from the dark basement of The Grabber before you become his latest victim in the terrifying The Black Phone.

houses.name: The Weeknd: After Hours Nightmare
houses.description: Prepare to enter the macabre mind of The Weeknd in this haunted house as he stalks your squad through the surreal nightmare of his After Hours music. A slasher carving a smile at an otherworldly rave. Bandaged maniacs performing extreme plastic surgery. A grotesque mannequin masquerade. His nightmare is now yours.

houses.name: Spirits Of The Coven
houses.description: A coven of beautiful ﬂapper witches will lure you into their 1920s speakeasy, reveal their haggish true form and turn your scream squad into a witch’s brew. They’ll be cackling; you’ll be screaming.

houses.name: Bugs: Eaten Alive
houses.description: While touring a 1950s home of the future, you’ll be surrounded by the slime of bugs everywhere as hordes of many-legged terrors descend upon you and your scream squad. You’ll be dropping like flies.

houses.name: Fiesta De Chupacabras
houses.description: Visit a Latin American village where the legend of the creature Chupacabras is celebrated with a colorful ﬁesta. And the streets are lined with the crimson blood of tourists like you and your amigos.

houses.name: Hellblock Horror
houses.description: Enter a prison whose savage inmates are monstrous creatures. If they break free from their cells, it’s a death sentence for everyone.

houses.name: Descendants Of Destruction
houses.description: Careful not to leave any of your scream squad behind as you descend the subway tunnels of a deserted New York. Lurking in the dark are hungry mutants looking to feast on the last remnants of humanity.

scarezones.name: Horrors Of Halloween
scarezones.description: The Pumpkin Lord, the spirit of Halloween, has taken over this year’s event, summoning hordes of fiendish creatures. Terror has taken root.

scarezones.name: Sweet Revenge
scarezones.description: The sweets from Major Sweets

scarezones.name: Conjure The Dark
scarezones.description: On the first All Hallow

scarezones.name: Scarecrow: Cursed Soil
scarezones.description: At an abandoned farm, scarecrows have risen from the crust of the earth to hunt you and seek revenge. They

shows.name: Nightmare Fuel: Wildfire
shows.description: The show that sparked a firestorm last year is ablaze with a new nightmare. The pyro and aerial performers are back to reignite your fears.

shows.name: Ghoulish! A Halloween Tale
shows.description: On a Halloween night, a ghost story becomes reality as you go beyond the grave in a spectacularly spooky show on Universal Studios

trivia: This is the first year that the event has ran a record-breaking 43 nights.
This is the first year that every night of Halloween Horror Nights will go until 2:00 a.m.
Although The Weeknd: After Hours Nightmare haunted house was one of the main ips of the event that year, the house was not marketed on the house line up shirt.

tagline: See You In The Fog/Never Go Alone
description: Halloween Horror Nights 32 was the 32nd Halloween Horror Nights event at Universal Studios Florida.

houses.name: Chucky: Ultimate Kill Count
houses.description: Chucky, the serial killer doll, is back for a new gorefest! He’s hijacked his own haunted house with all kinds of bloody hijinks. You and your friends must try to survive his ultimate kill count.

houses.name: The Last Of Us
houses.description: Enter the world of Naughty Dog’s video game in real life, as you fight to survive and navigate your way through an abandoned Pittsburgh with Joel and Ellie.

houses.name: Stranger Things 4
houses.description: Band together with your squad to resist Vecna’s gruesome curse as you take on the scariest season of Stranger Things yet.

houses.name: The Exorcist: Believer
houses.description: Two missing girls have been found with no memory of what happened to them. But wherever they went, the ultimate evil has returned with them. Enter the most terrifying scenes from the new Blumhouse film.

houses.name: Universal Monsters: Unmasked
houses.description: Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde, the Phantom of the Opera, the Hunchback of Notre Dame and the Invisible Man.

houses.name: Dr. Oddfellow'S Twisted Origins
houses.description: You won’t be able to resist going inside Dr. Oddfellow’s menacing menagerie of twisted oddities. But the price for you and your friends is steep: the cost of your souls to feed his immortal power.

houses.name: Dueling Dragons: Choose Thy Fate
houses.description: Two warlocks of great power were turned into dragons after trying to take Merlyn’s spell book. Now you and your friends are caught in their epic battle. You must choose a path and a victor.

houses.name: Yeti: Campground Kills
houses.description: You and your friends are about to venture into a 1950s campground overrun by huge, menacing yetis who rip apart anyone who gets in their way. You must flee to the ranger tower to escape.

houses.name: The Darkest Deal
houses.description: Blues musician Pinestraw Spruce will have to face the music after meeting with The Collector and trading his soul for musical glory. You and your squad learn the terrible price of fame.

houses.name: Bloodmoon: Dark Offerings
houses.description: In a Colonial-era village, moon-worshippers witness a blood moon at their fall festival. They take it as a sign to hunt down any non-followers, including you and your scream squad.

scarezones.name: Dr. Oddfellow'S Collection Of Horror
scarezones.description: Dr. Oddfellow will lure you into Halloween Horror Nights with a promise of immortality. As he lifts the veil on all the horrors to come, you’ll soon realize you may not even survive the night.

scarezones.name: Dark Zodiac
scarezones.description: Dr. Oddfellow has entered a dark dimension to harness the power of the Zodiac and live forever. He twists the signs into malevolent beings who foretell your doom. As his star rises, yours falls.

scarezones.name: Jungle Of Doom: Expedition Of Horror
scarezones.description: In the 1920s, Dr. Oddfellow ventured deep into the darkest jungle, performing horrific experiments on nature. Now his monstrous creations are running amok and are coming after you.

scarezones.name: Vamp '69: Summer Of Blood
scarezones.description: At a 60s music fest in a small New York town, you’ll jam to popular bands with fellow concert-goers until Dr. Oddfellow unleashes vicious vampires on the audience. They’re out for your blood.

scarezones.name: Shipyard 32: Horrors Unhinged
scarezones.description: Enter a 1940s San Francisco shipping yard full of mysterious crates and cages bearing Dr. Oddfellow’s symbol. Beware, his nightmarish oddities have now escaped, spreading fear and chaos in their wake.

shows.name: Nightmare Fuel: Revenge Dream
shows.description: The show that sparked your darkest dreams has reignited. Let your nightmares burn out of control as the pyro and aerial performers fire you up to the beat of metal and electronica.

notes: Tickets On Sale | Frequent Fear Passes On Sale | Death Eaters In Diagon Alley
trivia: This is the first year that the event has ran a record-breaking 48 nights.

tagline: Where Horror Lives/Fear Cannot Be Contained
description: Halloween Horror Nights 33 is the 33rd Halloween Horror Nights event at Universal Studios Florida. The event ran for 48 nights this year.

houses.name: Slaughter Sinema 2
houses.description: If you’re dying for a B-movie horror marathon, head to the Carey Drive-in. Scream through scenes from creature features, grindhouse gore, spaghetti westerns and more.

houses.name: Goblin'S Feast
houses.description: Visit a goblin village, where hordes of bloodthirsty goblins, orcs, hobgoblins and witches would love to have you for dinner.

houses.name: Major Sweets Candy Factory
houses.description: You’ve been invited to chaperone a field trip to a candy factory. But this sweet tour is about to turn sour when free samples transform the kids into candy-coated killers wielding sharpened candies.

houses.name: The Museum: Deadly Exhibit
houses.description: You decide to visit the new folklore museum exhibit, The Rotting Stone, when an evil escapes from within, destroying everything in its path.

houses.name: Monstruos: The Monsters Of Latin America
Triplets Of Terror
houses.description: You’re invited to the Barmy triplets’ birthday bash. But beware, they celebrate by recreating their family’s murders. Prepare for a gory gathering.

houses.name: A Quiet Place
houses.description: Silence your screams if you want to survive this terrifying, post-apocalyptic world based on the films “A Quiet Place” and “A Quiet Place Part II.” Like the Abbott family, you must keep quiet as you travel from the farmhouse, to the woods, to the foundry. As soon as you make a sound, monstrous creatures who can hear the slightest noise will hunt you down and silence you for good.

houses.name: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
houses.description: In this bone-chilling haunted house inspired by the film “Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire,” the Ghostbusters must team up to save the world from a second Ice Age. A new specter, Garraka, has escaped from an ancient artifact. He’ll stop you cold with a whole army of ghosts. Try not to freeze in fear as you dodge spears of ice and he freezes people solid before your eyes.

houses.name: Insidious: The Further
houses.description: Don’t get trapped in The Further as terrifying demons try to ensnare you. The Red-Faced Demon will lure you into his lair behind The Red Door, so he can possess your living body. And KeyFace will unlock your fears with his key-tipped fingers to keep your soul trapped in The Further forever.

houses.name: Universal Monsters: Eternal Bloodlines
houses.description: Join Saskia Van Helsing and the Bride of Frankenstein as they face off against Dracula

scarezones.name: Torture Faire
scarezones.description: Come one, come all, to the renaissance faire. Brave the gloriously gory medieval torture devices ‘til you’re put out of your misery.

scarezones.name: Swamp Of The Undead
scarezones.description: In backwaters Louisiana, you’re about to be swamped by zombies borne from the bodies of trespassers killed and dumped in a nearby bog

scarezones.name: Duality Of Fear
scarezones.description: As soon as you enter Halloween Horror Nights you must choose a path: the visceral horror of SINIST3R or the unearthly terror of SURR3AL.

scarezones.name: Demon Queens
scarezones.description: Get caught in an otherworldly hellscape ripped from the darkest corners of your mind, where four merciless queens loyal to SURR3AL rule.

scarezones.name: Enter The Blumhouse
scarezones.description: Run a terrifying gauntlet of Blumhouse characters. From The Grabber to M3GAN dancing into your nightmares, this is a new kind of horror.

shows.name: Nightmare Fuel: Nocturnal Circus
shows.description: Step right up to a dark circus, a twisted nightmare you

trivia: This is the first year since 2021 the Never Go Alone tagline was not used.
This is the first year that two hurricanes had cost the event to cancel some event nights.

Every year, Halloween Horror Nights puts a prop small animal inside all of the houses. This year the animal was a Snail. All of the snails were slightly different, but they all had the same brownish look and slimy features.
This was the last year guests could ride the Hollywood Rip Ride Rocket at the event before it closed in 2025.

tagline: Never Go Alone/Live The Horror/Face Fear Incarnate
description: Halloween Horror Nights 34 is the 34th Halloween Horror Nights event at Universal Studios Florida. The event ran for 48 nights.

houses.name: Fallout
houses.description: Face your fears in the post-apocalyptic hellscape of the hit show “Fallout”.

houses.name: Jason Universe
houses.ipName: Freddy vs. Jason / Friday the 13th / A Nightmare on Elm Street
houses.description: The iconic horror villain Jason Voorhees is coming for you. Step into his terrifying world, from his sinister shack in the woods to the summer camp where it all began.

houses.name: El Artista: A Spanish Haunting
houses.description: In 19th century Spain, a tortured artist moves into an isolated country manor for inspiration, but the art comes alive and possesses him.

houses.name: Dolls: Let'S Play Dead
houses.description: You’re about to become doll-sized and be hunted by toys that have been burnt, melded and stitched together by a twisted little girl.

houses.name: Grave Of Flesh
houses.description: Welcome to your funeral, where things are about to go from bad to worse. You’ll enter your grave and then the underworld, where flesh-eaters who feed on the dead will hunt you for all eternity.

houses.name: Galkn: Monsters Of The North
houses.description: In a remote northern village, a wicked being rises from the dead with a horde of monsters. Try to escape the belly of the beast.

houses.name: Terrifier
houses.description: Try your luck against Art the Clown in the Terrifier funhouse. You’ll witness his grotesque handiwork of torture and be exposed to the spatter of his victims. It’s a whole new level of gore!

houses.name: Wwe Presents: The Horrors Of The Wyatt Sicks

scarezones.name: The Origins Of Horror
scarezones.description: Enter a decaying conservatory of twisted vines where artists carve tributes to Halloween Horror Nights 34. You’ll encounter monstrous crows, gargoyles and more.

scarezones.name: Masquerade: Dance W/ Death
scarezones.description: You’re invited to a masquerade ball where bloodthirsty vampires lurk behind ornate disguises. When their masks fall, you’ll become their prey.

scarezones.name: The Cat Lady Of Crooked Lane
scarezones.description: Travel down a spooky winding path to a mysterious home, where trick-or-treaters are transformed into feral felines. Be careful or you’ll be next.

scarezones.name: Mutations: Toxic Twenties
scarezones.description: In a 1920s neighborhood, a BuzzCon truck with radioactive cargo crashes into a mobster getaway car sending the city into toxic pandemonium.

scarezones.name: Mel'S Die-In Zombies
scarezones.description: It’s time for the graveyard shift as Mel’s Die-In Zombies take over, eager to serve bystanders up on a platter.

scarezones.name: Club Horror
scarezones.description: On the streets of San Francisco, guests will enter

shows.name: Nightmare Fuel: Circus Of Decay
shows.description: This once-vibrant circus has festered into an unending nightmare. It’s a sinister spectacle of pyro, aerialists and illusions.

shows.name: Haunt-O-Phonic: A Ghoulish Journey
shows.description: A ghost story is rising from its watery grave to haunt the Universal Studios lagoon, featuring towering water screens and eerie music.

trivia: The codenames for this year's houses would be based around different types of flowers.
This was the first year since 2013 that Universal would lower the number of scarezones down to 4. They would also bring back street experiences with Mel's Die-In Zombies & Club Horror.
The Express upgrades for the Frequent Fear passes would sell out in record time the day they were released.
Every year, Halloween Horror Nights puts a prop small animal inside all of the houses. This year the animal was a lizard.

This year was the first year that flame bursts would happen at certain parts in the park. They occurred in the front of the park above the neon sign, above a building in Sting Alley, and atop the Simpsons Ride building.
The trailer for the event featured actor David Howard Thornton portraying Art the Clown.

tagline: 35 Years of Horror/Horror that haunts you. Fear that consumes you./Let Fear Consume You/35 Years of Undying Horror - A World of Relentless Terror/A Terrifying Event Where The Biggest Names in Horror Haunt You/Never Go Alone
description: Halloween Horror Nights 35 will be the 35th annual Halloween Horror Nights in Universal Studios Florida. It will be the 35th year anniversary of the event, and the fifth overall anniversary year celebrated. The event will run from August 28th to November 1st, 2026.

houses.name: Jack & Oddfellow: Chaos & Control
houses.description: Witness Jack the Clown’s unholy origins, then enter Dr. Oddfellow’s wickedly twisted universe where two of the most powerful forces in horror face off in a deathmatch of chaos versus control.

houses.name: Sinners
houses.description: Head to Club Juke as the Smokestack Twins fend off bloodthirsty vampires in this haunted house based on the award-winning film.

houses.name: Stranger Things 5
houses.description: Join the Hawkins gang for one last adventure. Try to survive an army of Demogorgons, face the Mind Flayer and defeat Vecna once and for all in this haunted house based on Stranger Things 5.

houses.name: H.R. Bloodengutz Presents: A Halloween Fright-Tacular!
houses.description: On a dark and stormy Halloween night, your favorite maître d’macabre returns to WKNB with a special scare-athon! Tune into a curated selection of H.R. Bloodengutz’ Halloween favorites in this haunted house complete with ghouls, gore and all the frights that keep you coming back for more.

trivia: According to Lora Sauls, they began building the 35th anniversary of the event in April of 2025 and all five of the original haunted houses for the event had been approved.
According to Mike Aiello, all of this year's content resides within this infernal carnival of Jack and Oddfellow's creation
This is the sixth time Jack the Clown would be the icon in the event's history, as well as this being Dr. Oddfellow's second time.
The name for this year's setting - Infernal Carnival of Nightmares - is initialized as "I.C.O.N."
The Premier Scream Ticket would for the first time have two separate nights as a choice, August 27th or October 19th.
This year would have the second earliest ticket drop for the event behind Halloween Horror Nights 32.
This would be the sixth year that Universal would use the "Never Go Alone" slogan in the marketing of the event.
